description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a low-pitched, gray gable roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a neatly defined yard and driveway. The structure features a combination of white and beige exterior walls, with large windows distributed along the front and sides, allowing ample natural light inside. A small covered porch is visible at the main entrance, providing a welcoming transition from the driveway to the front door. The property is bordered by a low fence and includes a driveway leading to a garage attached to the side of the house. The landscaping is minimal, with a few small trees and shrubs placed strategically around the yard. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gray gable roof, white and beige walls, large windows, a small front porch, and an attached garage, set within a fenced yard.
description_view_0: This view shows the bungalow from the side, highlighting the attached garage, driveway, and the main entrance with its small porch.
description_view_1: This view presents the bungalow from the rear, emphasizing the backyard area, rear windows, and the overall rectangular shape of the property.
description_view_2: This view displays the opposite side of the bungalow, showing the side yard, additional windows, and the fence line.
description_view_3: This view captures the front of the bungalow, focusing on the main entrance, porch, and the symmetrical arrangement of front-facing windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
